anti_leak.protocol: Drop any training variant whose (chrom,pos,ref,alt) appears in test.parquet. Do not use any listed leaky source.
forbidden_sources_avoided: AlphaMissense / REVEL / ClinPred / BayesDel / dbNSFP ClinVar col / MyVariant ClinVar field / VEP ClinVar plugin

features.cadd: https://krishna.gs.washington.edu/download/CADD/v1.7/GRCh38/whole_genome_SNVs.tsv.gz (remote tabix; raw + PHRED, alt-matched; CADD is trained on evolutionary sim-vs-derived, not ClinVar)

regulatory_positives: https://zenodo.org/records/3517189/files/dapg_eqtl.tar (GTEx v8 DAP-G fine-mapped eQTLs; PIP>0.9; coords in variant_id chr_pos_ref_alt_b38)
coding_positives: https://api.mavedb.org/api/v1/ (DMS/MAVE effect maps; mapped-variants GRCh38 VRS)
negatives_benign: gs://gcp-public-data--gnomad/release/4.1/vcf/genomes/gnomad.genomes.v4.1.sites.chr{N}.vcf.bgz (AF>0.05 common; via tabix, HTTPS storage.googleapis.com mirror)

notes: Do NOT use raw allele frequency as a feature: common=benign holds for ClinVar but is anti-predictive for common-trait GWAS (TraitGym), so AF does not transfer. Use conservation/CADD/functional features which transfer across both partitions.
